blanketExpenses.label: Misc Everyday Spending
blanketExpenses.note: Groceries, coffee, takeout, etc. Intentionally rough — covers the long tail of daily spending that isn't worth itemizing individually.

blanketExpenses.label: Shopping / Amazon
blanketExpenses.note: Household goods, clothing, random Amazon purchases. Historically ~$150–250/mo.

blanketExpenses.label: Personal Care
blanketExpenses.note: Haircuts, toiletries, pharmacy. Combined household estimate.
